title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation
description: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Learners cumulatively produce a risk-to-test coverage matrix through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
